positive: A mystical, bioluminescent forest scene viewed from a slight high angle, featuring geometric, stylized fantasy flora and fauna. The central element is a group of glowing, symmetrical 'fairy lights' or abstract constellations hanging between intertwined, elegant, oversized leaves and vines. Use a deep indigo and vibrant cyan color palette with accents of electric lime and gold, creating high contrast and negative space. The style should be modern ethereal abstract line art mixed with detailed engraving etching, suitable for a repeatable print pattern. Clean silhouettes are paramount; everything should feel highly defined and crisp. Focus on symmetry and visual balance. Minimal photorealism, maximum graphic design appeal. --ar 1:1 --s 750
negative: blurry, out of focus, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, dirty, noise, messy, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, photorealistic, cinematic lighting
